/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/6.0.3/libexec/em++ -s USE_SDL=0 -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s NO_EXIT_RUNTIME=1 -s FORCE_FILESYSTEM=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=[_main,_load_rom_from_js,_get_video_buffer,_get_video_buffer_size,_set_button,_get_audio_buffer,_get_audio_samples_available,_fill_audio_buffer,_set_audio_muted] -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=[ccall,cwrap,FS,HEAPU8,HEAPF32] --shell-file /Users/hieunguyen/code/personal/GB-EMU_Tizen/src/index.html @CMakeFiles/gb-emu.dir/objects1.rsp -o gb-emu.html
